mission_brief.title: PM superpower recovery mission
mission_brief.mission_summary: ProductOS should help PMs turn messy product reality into governed artifacts, alignment outputs, and execution loops while driving repeatable customer and business outcomes.
mission_brief.target_user: Product manager using ProductOS with approved AI agents
mission_brief.customer_problem: PMs spend too much time reconstructing the same truth into artifacts, presentations, reviews, and weekly operating loops.
mission_brief.business_goal: Reduce PM setup friction and make ProductOS credible as the PM operating system for the first impatient customer.
primary_outcomes: Generate one repo-native PM control plane from a single mission.
primary_kpis: time from intake to reviewable PRD
success_metrics: time from intake to reviewable PRD
constraints: Keep PM approval explicit for decision-driving scope and release movement.

mission_router.routing_rationale: Run the full PM loop from a mission-first discover start while keeping PM approval explicit at every decision-driving boundary.
stop_conditions: Stop if any phase loses provenance, reviewability, or PM approval visibility.

operating_norms: Treat the repository as the system of record.

stage_goals.discovery: Create a reviewable mission-first discovery packet with explicit evidence posture.

known_risks: The PM control center is still generated from artifacts and should not be claimed as deeper autonomy.
mission_brief.next_action: Run the mission through discover first, keep evidence and approvals explicit, then expand phase coverage only when the prior outputs stay reviewable.

primary_outcomes: Give the PM one control center instead of many disconnected commands.
primary_kpis: time from intake to reviewable PRD
risk_summary: Canonical multi-product portfolio state is newly introduced and still thin.

primary_outcomes: Generate one mission-first cockpit bundle per workspace.
primary_kpis: time from intake to reviewable PM package
portfolio_state.summary: The current portfolio contains one active product workspace with delivery work on track and no blocked cross-product dependencies.

primary_outcomes: Give the PM one control center instead of many disconnected commands.
primary_kpis: time from intake to reviewable PRD

active_phase_packet.phase_goal: Create a reviewable mission-first discovery packet with explicit evidence posture.
question_prompts: What is the highest-signal decision the PM needs from discovery?

task_queue.title: Discovery task 1
task_queue.summary: Frame the problem in customer language before solution framing expands.

success_metrics.metric_name: time from intake to reviewable PRD
success_metrics.target_signal: Discovery should improve time from intake to reviewable prd without weakening reviewability.

recommended_pm_actions.summary: Approve the bounded discovery packet only after the evidence trail and next decision stay legible.
recommended_pm_actions.assumption_note: Task content is maturity-aware scaffolding until workspace-specific evidence replaces the starter defaults.

mission_control.current_task_name: Choose the first V3.1 runtime expansion
mission_control.current_task_summary: The runtime foundation is complete, so the PM should choose the next bounded expansion from one visible control surface.

cockpit_state.request_summary: Operate the completed V3.0 runtime foundation from one PM-facing cockpit surface.
cockpit_state.current_focus: Keep queue actions, intake routing, and memory reuse legible now that the V3.0 runtime foundation is live.

recommended_next_step.action_summary: Review the highest-priority post-launch decision and follow-up item from the live runtime queues.
recommended_next_step.rationale: V3.0 is complete, so the cockpit should now steer ongoing prioritization instead of waiting on foundation work.

active_agents.current_task: Maintain PM-visible runtime state and expose the next controlled action.

active_queue_refs.summary: Choose the first V3.1 runtime expansion based on the completed V3.0 benchmark evidence

queue_recommendations.why_now: The runtime foundation is live and the next decision should shape the first V3.1 expansion based on evidence.

budget_status.pause_reason: No route-level budget threshold is currently breached.

recommended_pm_actions.summary: Review the discovery packet and keep the next phase blocked until the evidence trail is explicit.
recommended_pm_actions.assumption_note: The recommendation is seeded from repo-visible scaffolding until workspace evidence replaces the starter defaults.

orchestration_state.goal: Execute the V3 runtime foundation with visible coordination, intake, memory, and release-gate proof.
orchestration_state.coordination_summary: The runtime foundation route is complete, validation passed, and the cockpit is now the stable PM-visible control surface.

mission_control.current_task_name: Choose the first V3.1 runtime expansion
mission_control.current_task_summary: The runtime foundation is complete, so the next controlled move is a bounded expansion decision rather than more hidden coordination.

route_plan.objective: Generate benchmark, runtime scenario, and release-gate proof artifacts.
route_plan.rationale: V3 should prove improvement over V2 with explicit evidence rather than narrative claims.
route_plan.next_action: Use the completed proof package to choose the first evidence-backed V3.1 runtime expansion.

queue_impacts.reason: The runtime foundation is shipped, and this decision now shapes the first evidence-backed V3.1 expansion.

insights.title: Reuse signals from PM superpower recovery mission
insights.summary: The mission already captures explicit KPIs, review ownership, and a bounded PM-first control plane.
insights.reusable_recommendation: Reuse the mission intake, KPI framing, and approval posture before opening a parallel workspace flow.

strategy_refresh_posture.recommendation: Refresh the canonical strategy packet from the governed research surface, then persist the missing downstream packet artifacts: opportunity_portfolio_view, prioritization_decision_record, feature_prioritization_brief.

recommended_pm_actions.summary: Review the discovery packet and keep the next phase blocked until the evidence trail is explicit.
